title: Test History
description: Persistent test result history for flaky detection, quarantine, and predictive test selection. Stored at .forge/test-history.json.

run_count.description: Total pipeline runs that wrote to this file

tests.description: Keyed by fully qualified test identifier

last_10_results.description: Last N run outcomes (bounded by history_window config). Most recent first.

flaky_score.description: Computed flaky score (0.0 = stable, 1.0 = maximally flaky). Null-equivalent 0.0 when insufficient data.

consecutive_passes.description: Consecutive passes since entering OBSERVATION. 0 when HEALTHY or QUARANTINED.

avg_duration_ms.description: Rolling average test execution duration in milliseconds

associated_files.description: Implementation files associated with this test (imports, naming, historical correlation)

last_run.description: Date of the most recent run that included this test (ISO 8601 date)

prediction_accuracy.description: Prediction accuracy tracking for predictive test selection

targeted_catches.description: Runs where the targeted pass caught all failures

targeted_misses.description: Runs where remaining tests revealed failures not in targeted set

accuracy_pct.description: Percentage of runs where targeted pass caught all failures
